EipInquiry.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For bandwidth-billed EIPs, must be an integer between 1 and 200 (representing the bandwidth cap); for traffic-billed EIPs, must be an integer between 1 and 1000 (representing the peak bandwidth allowed).
EipInquiry.count: Number of EIPs to purchase, default is 1.
EipInquiry.purchaseType: EIP line type selection. Options: BGP, Static, ChinaTelecom, ChinaUnicom, ChinaMobile. Default is BGP.
EipInquiry.billing: Billing information, supporting both prepaid and postpaid (bandwidth or traffic) modes.
EipInquiry.billing.billingMethod: Billing method: ByTraffic, ByBandwidth, ByPeak95 (only supported for shared bandwidth postpaid), or ByNetrafficMax (only supported for shared bandwidth postpaid).
EipInquiry.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for postpaid; must be set for prepaid.
